ItacPersonItem.Notes: Learned antiquary, temporarry librarian to Cardinal Barberini. Joined the Accademia di Cristina di Svezia in 1674. He was charged with editing the Latin verses of the Monumentum. See Gravit (1934).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
